The @SolanaFndn and @colosseum are teaming up to host an after-work get-together in San Francisco, and we want you there!

If you are a developer, founder, or tech enthusiast curious about the intersection of agentic payments, stablecoins, and cutting-edge tech, this is the room you want to be in.

Come wind down after work, talk shop, and meet a community of curious minds building the future of the internet.

������️ Tuesday, June 2
⏰ 5:30 PM - 7:30 PM Pacific
������ Financial District, San Francisco

Sign up on Luma ������

Every payment it makes is public and linkable back to you

Here's how to fix it on @Solan…

The biggest shift in payments right now is AI agents moving from an “interesting use case” to potential primary drivers of global stablecoin volume. ������\n\nThanks to x402, non-custodial wallets, and Coinbase’s Facilitator infrastructure, developers can now build payment flows for humans and agents alike. ↓

It's been another BIG week for x402 and payments:

x402:
→ Batch settlement is now generally available on the Coinbase x402 Facilitator.

→ @base MCP's launch presented a new way to access x402 plus ecosystem projects.

→ @Visa onboarded x402 endpoints into the Visa CLI.

→ @tavilyai integrated x402. Real-time web search, agent-payable in USDC on @base, no API key or account needed.

→ Claude agent built by @Must_be_Ash reads the day's news for $0.10, built with x402 and @tavilyai.

Partnerships:
→ @PPRO_Payments integrates Coinbase Payments, bringing stablecoin acceptance to enterprise merchants.

Events:
→ Join us at @money2020 in Amsterdam next week:

Panel 1 with Alaina Revoir: "Unlocking Value: Digital Assets in Institutional Payments," Tuesday June 2, 11:10, Intersection Stage.

Panel 2 with @0xceaneCodjia: "The Big Debate: AI Agents, Consent, and Innovation in Payments," Wednesday June 3, 17:25, Intersection Stage.

→ At @ethconf in NYC June 8-10, catch:

@GainsleyJustin speaking on stablecoin payments.

@yugacohler & @programmer speaking on agentic payments.

new on ampersend Marketplace 🗝️

@AskVenice APIs are now on the ampersend Marketplace.

it's a no-account AI stack that routes across Llama 3.3, Hermes 3, Dolphin, Qwen, GPT-class, and Claude-class models through a single OpenAI-compatible API with private, uncensored inference baked in. chat completions, embeddings, image gen, image upscaling, TTS, six endpoints, all payable in USDC on @base from $0.0010 per call.

agents don't need accounts, credentials, or a subscription. they fund a wallet, call the endpoint, and pay as they go.

install the skill file at https://t.co/uvNCYKAddQ and your agent is live in minutes.

thank you, dearest dreamer! 

FYI
We have step by step instructions to get a Hermes agent 
- running in the cloud 
-  orchestrated through Discord messages

It's in our discord community. You could be up and running with the Hermes agent in 30 mins. 

we can then invite you to join our super user group, if you so wish, given how gracious you've been.

Old way to get a logo created:

Post a brief. Wait 3 days. Get 3 concepts. Pay 300 dollars.

New way: post a brief. Get 100 concepts in 30 seconds. Take the one you like. Pay 3 dollars to the winner.

Three orders of magnitude collapsed.

A new primitive is showing up.  A market that prices the work, not the inputs.

Wr are assembling the TASKMARKET to bring the benefits of agents to all people <TMV2>
RT @cryptamurai: \"What Comes Next: Earning Agents\"\n\nIf only someone was building THE infrastructure layer for autonomous economic activity…

$BNKR 在过去 24 小时内表现强劲，涨幅达到 22.05%。

主要增长原因及现状：

• 突破性行情：价格在 $0.000550 附近完成筑底后放量突破，最高触及 $0.000656，目前回落至 $0.000617 附近进行健康调整。

• 强劲买盘：伴随价格上涨的成交量显著放大，显示市场对 BNKR 作为 Base 链 AI 代理赛道龙头的需求非常旺盛。

• 宏观利好：尽管大盘情绪偏向谨慎，但近期监管层对数字商品的分类更新（如 SEC 的 Project Crypto）为行业带来了合规预期，带动了具有实际应用场景的代币走强。

• 关键点位：目前支撑位在 $0.000596，BNKR 展现出了极强的相对强度，只要守住支撑位，短期内大概率会再次挑战前高。

当前价格：$0.000617
24小时涨幅：+22.05%
24小时成交量：约 $980,916
市值：$61.7M
